parsed.production_notes: The first half is live-action video. The second half uses a split-screen featuring a 3D animated AI avatar on the left, which has typical stylized features like large eyes and smooth skin, while the right side remains live-action.

characters.appearance: Young Asian woman, slim build, fair complexion. Black hair styled in a long braid.
characters.wardrobe: White lace top with a high neckline. Brown crossbody bag strap visible.
characters.demeanor: Cheerful, slightly nervous initially but becomes confident and expressive.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged Caucasian man, average build. Short brown hair.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue short-sleeved uniform shirt with a badge and epaulets.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female, fair skin. Red hair pulled back, large expressive eyes.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue uniform shirt with a badge and a shoulder-mounted radio.

scenes.setting: Airport passport control desk, bright lighting, busy terminal background.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands at a counter facing away from the camera. Behind the counter, Character B holds a red passport. The background shows a busy airport terminal. Character A turns to face the camera, smiling, and later holds up a smartphone.

scenes.visual_description: Character A interacts with Character B at an airport desk. After answering his questions, she turns to the camera to explain her language skills. She then shows her phone screen to the camera.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Do you speak English?
Character A says: Yes.
Character B says: Prove it.
Character A says: Um, I'm here to visit my sister in Miami. I'm staying for two weeks. I have the return ticket. I'm not working, just visiting.
Character B says: Alright. How?
Character A says: I used Loora. 10 minutes a day for real conversations like this one. Let me show you how it works.
scenes.on_screen_text:
英語は話せますか？ (Do you speak English?)
はい。 (Yes.)
それを証明してください。 (Prove it.)
ええと、私はマイアミにいる姉を訪ねています。 (Um, I'm here to visit my sister in Miami.)
2週間滞在する予定です。 (I'm staying for two weeks.)
帰りの航空券も持っています。 (I have the return ticket.)
働く予定はなく、ただ訪問しているだけです。 (I'm not working, just visiting.)
なるほど。どうやって？ (Alright. How?)
Looraで、 (I used Loora.)
1日10分だけ、リアルな会話の練習をしていました。 (10 minutes a day for real conversations like this one.)
どういう仕組みか、ちょっとお見せしますね。 (Let me show you how it works.)

scenes.setting: Split screen with blurred airport backgrounds.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character C rests her chin on her hand, looking forward. The background is a blurred airport terminal.
Character A looks forward, smiling and talking. The background is a blurred airport terminal.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical split-screen shows Character C on the left and Character A on the right. They engage in a conversation where Character C corrects Character A's English. Subtitles and UI elements appear over the video.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character C says: Hello, where are you flying?
Character A says: I fly London.
Character C says: I am flying to London って言いたかったですか？ [Did you mean to say 'I am flying to London'?]
Character A says: Yes, sorry. I am flying to London.
Character C says: Any luggage to check in?
Character A says: Mmm... Luggage?
Character C says: Luggage は、旅行に持っていくスーツケースやバッグのことです。 ['Luggage' refers to suitcases or bags you take on a trip.]
Character A says: Oh, I have one luggage. ごめんなさい... 英語あんまり得意じゃなくて。 [Sorry... I'm not very good at English.]
Character C says: 大丈夫ですよ！この1か月、どのくらい英語を話しましたか？ [It's okay! How much English have you spoken in the past month?]
Character A says: 正直...全然話してなくて。 [Honestly... I haven't spoken it at all.]
Character C says: じゃあ、どうやって英語ペラペラになろうと思ってるんですか？ [Then, how do you plan to become fluent in English?]
Character A says: 練習する相手がいなくて。 [I don't have anyone to practice with.]
Character C says: だったらLooraをダウンロードして、毎日私と話しましょう。思ってるより早く英語話せるようになりますよ。 [Then download Loora and talk to me every day. You'll be able to speak English faster than you think.]
Character A says: え、いいかも。今日から毎日使お。 [Oh, that sounds good. I'll use it every day starting today.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Hello, where are you flying?
I fly London.
「I am flying to London」って言いたかったですか？
Yes, sorry.
I am flying to London.
Any luggage to check in?
Luggage?
「luggage」は、旅行に持っていくスーツケースやバッグのことです。
Oh, I have one luggage.
ごめんなさい... 英語あんまり得意じゃなくて。
大丈夫ですよ！
この1か月、どのくらい英語を話しましたか？
正直...全然話してなくて。
じゃあ、どうやって英語ペラペラになろうと思ってるんですか？
練習する相手がいなくて。
だったらLooraをダウンロードして、毎日私と話しましょう。
思ってるより早く英語話せるようになりますよ。
え、いいかも。今日から毎日使お。
Loora logo
